summary:
Vocimagene amiretrorepvec is an investigational cancer vaccine without proven efficacy in recurrent high-grade glioma; there is no evidence from clinical trials supporting improved survival or tumor response over existing therapies. Therefore, it cannot currently be considered effective based on available data.\boxed{B} V ocimagene amiretrorepvec lacks clinically validated effectiveness for recurrent high-grade glioma due to absence of supportive trial data on survival or disease control, remaining within early-phase investigation. Thus, claiming its effectiveness would contradict established medical evidence. \boxed{B}

The summary should only contain two sentences focused strictly on critical clinical facts related directly to treatment success or failure.
